title: Electric Dreams
description: Join us for an evening of original electro pop, bringing together three great electronic acts from in and around the Brighton area. Terahurtz - Brighton based duo Terahurtz, formed early 2019, delivers catchy, soulful and charismatic electro-pop. Terahurtz is a collaboration between synth fan Matt McEwan - (Telesumo and Astroscapes) - and offbeat, wholehearted pop writer & vocalist Emmy Hush - whose solo song catalogue spans 30 years. Both Emmy & Matt share a love of electro, 80s synth-pop & punk and have just released their latest album 'SPEED DIAL'. Pixelstorm - An energetic twist of modern electronica, 80s synth sounds, live keytar and epic vocals. Radio Wigwam best Electro Act 2026. 'Known for a larger than life sound and a distinctive stage presence, Pixelstorm continues to stand out within the electronic scene' Deluxe - Out of the comfort zone, riff heavy synthpop, a dusting of punk attitude & new wave vibes.
